goal: Add local guard fixtures proving the mock Builder Adapter blocks scope violations and forbidden operations before any live Builder endpoint is introduced.
claims: A scope-violation fixture proves out-of-scope changed files are blocked.
A blocked-operation fixture proves no-go adapter operations are blocked.
A local fixture test script checks committed expected outputs against current adapter behavior.
assumptions: BP-008 should not change adapter implementation behavior.
Fixtures are sufficient for this guard step before live endpoint work.
No package, docs, or existing tool edits are required.
dod: Scope-violation input/output fixtures exist and output status is blocked.
Blocked-operation input/output fixtures exist and output status is blocked.
stop_conditions: Real Builder endpoint or network call becomes necessary
prior_task_findings: BP-007 created a mock Builder Adapter and recommended fixtures for scope violations and blocked operations before live Builder endpoint work.
